## Source: ghsa-malware (d594de237a46f62eef4bc6713a47e736c8b2a11aed93e21db16922181fae50b5)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (6809fd87c593e76bcb0bd4a719cab9e51e2d3b617f9a172d0a8a2f68a09474e7)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'spamurai-dev-kit' @ 3.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
